Fall hike up busy Cascade

Went across the lake for a quick 4000 footer in the ADK

  • Written: Sep 25, 2015
  • Date hiked: Dec 23, 2025
  • Distance: 4.8 miles
  • Town: Keene
  • State: New York

It’s apparently the most popular of New York’s high peaks, probably because it’s also one of the easiest.

Brought my Olympus E-PL5 for these:

  • trip-report
  • New York
  • Keene
